docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-03-2013 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-03-2013 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES.
